acquisition method: analyzed using DDA mode which consisted of an MS1 spectrum
collision energy: the top 12 peaks were triggered for HCD fragmentation with a normalized collision energy of 30
fractionation method: fractionated into 14 fractions by strong cation exchange chromatography (SCX)
fragmentation method: the 12 most intense precursor ions were selected for HCD fragmentation
instrument: analyzed with a Q Exactive Plus mass spectrometer
labeling: peptides were labeled with iTRAQ (4plex Applications Kit, AB Sciex)
